title: Package Download Lifecycle
activity_flow: [getAvailableSources] if prevPackage && prevSource in sources && not (stable-dist→dev) → sort sources by prevSource first (keep same source on update)
[getAvailableSources] else if !preferSource && (preferDist || resolvePackageInstallPreference=='dist') → reverse sources (dist first)
[resolvePackageInstallPreference] iterate packagePreferences patterns (glob→regex) → match package name
[getDownloaderForPackage] installationSource mismatch downloader type → throw LogicException
if no more sources OR sourceFallback==false → throw (optionally log 'fallback disabled')
else → log warning, retry download closure with next source (retry=true)
on IrrecoverableDownloadException or other → re-throw immediately
prepare_flow: if downloader → downloader->prepare(type, package, targetDir, prevPackage)
update_flow: if downloader null (became metapackage) → initialDownloader->remove(initial, targetDir)
if same type → downloader->update(initial, target, targetDir)
on RuntimeException + interactive → ask user to confirm reinstall
if different type OR user confirms reinstall:
cleanup_flow: if downloader → downloader->cleanup(type, package, targetDir, prevPackage)
key_decisions: source vs dist priority: preferSource flag → source first; preferDist flag OR resolveInstallPreference=='dist' → dist first; default: source first
per-package preference: packagePreferences map (glob patterns) overrides global flags
dev packages default to source; stable packages default to dist
update continuity: reuse previous package's install source when updating (unless stable-dist→dev upgrade)
downloader type change on update: remove old + fresh install instead of in-place update
sourceFallback: if disabled, no retry on failure even if alternative sources exist
metapackage: getDownloaderForPackage returns null → all operations are no-ops (resolve null)
key_relationships: DownloadManager aggregates DownloaderInterface instances keyed by type string
DownloaderInterface provides: download(), prepare(), install(), update(), remove(), cleanup(), getInstallationSource()
important_notes: All public operations return PromiseInterface (async/React). The download() method has retry-with-fallback logic cycling through available sources on RuntimeException. IrrecoverableDownloadException bypasses retry entirely. The $type parameter in prepare/cleanup is one of: install|update|uninstall.
